headline: Europe once again signals openness to dialogue with Putin
description: European countries seek to reopen a channel of communication with Russia, with France first among them, at a time when the US appears to be losing interest in the war in Ukraine.

headline: Beyond AI billions, energy emerges as the crucial battleground at Choose France summit
California's primary elections serves as test for divided Democrats
2026 World Cup poses massive security challenge for US law enforcement
description: For the first time, the tournament will feature 48 teams and be played across three countries, all amid heightened geopolitical tensions. US authorities are already working behind the scenes to ensure the event runs safely and smoothly.

headline: Trump to attend new White House press gala after shooting
description: US President Donald Trump announced on Tuesday that he will speak at the White House correspondents dinner, which has been rescheduled for July 24. At this year's edition that was held in April, Trump had to be evacuated after shots erupted at a security checkpoint outside the ballroom venue.

headline: 'It's the Palme d'Or of French hospitality': The government unveils its updated list of the 33 most luxurious hotels in France
description: The new round of the government's 'Palaces de France' label was revealed on June 2, with six new additions and four removals. The initiative aims to showcase this flagship sector of French expertise, even though the owners of these establishments are rarely French.

headline: Violence amid PSG celebrations is punished with prison: 'Are we living in a society of chaos? No'
description: On Monday, trials were held for some of the 890 people arrested across France after Paris Saint-Germain won the Champions League.
byline: Grégoire Biseau,  Jérôme Lefilliâtre and  Richard Schittly

Putin faces a series of setbacks, fueling discontent in Russia and raising doubts about his strategy
description: While the Russian president claims that victory in Ukraine is within reach, Kyiv is stepping up drone strikes deep inside Russian territory. These military setbacks compound the country's mounting economic difficulties.

headline: Elon Musk, SpaceX and the illusion of wealth
description: The upcoming stock market listing of SpaceX values the company, of which the billionaire owns less than 50%, at nearly $2 trillion. This figure relies on the success of projects that are unrealistic within any reasonable financial timeframe, such as establishing a colony on Mars or building data centers in space.

headline: The Fontainebleau Forest's ever-growing popularity threatens this jewel of biodiversity near Paris
description: Managers of the forest complex are wondering how to deal with the increasing influx of visitors: Will development contain overtourism or encourage it?
